title: median function breaks when the column contains NULL values
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_median ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value DOUBLE PRECISION, category VARCHAR(50) );
UPDATE test_median SET value = NULL WHERE category = 'A';
SELECT percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY value) FROM test_median WHERE category = 'B';
SELECT percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY value) FROM test_median WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: median function fails with NULL values in column
